name: Platinum Group Metals Ltd.
description: Platinum Group Metals Ltd. is a Canadian exploration and development company focused on platinum group metals. The company's flagship asset is the Waterberg Project, a large-scale, bulk mineable underground palladium, platinum, gold, and rhodium deposit located on the Northern Limb of the Bushveld Complex in South Africa. Platinum Group Metals is actively working to advance the Waterberg Project toward development and production, while also exploring other mineral opportunities.
